violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Ice machine backsplash was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Exposed wall studs found in the storage room. Studs should be covered with a nonabsorbent, smooth, easily cleanable material or sealed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling above the ice machine and home-style oven was found with paint chipping, peeling. Ceiling should be repaired and maintained in good repair.
